message:
fix: resolve biome lint warnings (bd-189t)

- robot-api-conformance.test.ts: Add proper RegExpExecArray typing and
  restructure while loop to avoid assignment in expression
- logParser.worker.ts: Add biome-ignore for intentional ANSI escape
  code control character in regex
- skeletons/index.tsx: Replace div[role=region] with semantic section
  elements to fix a11y/useSemanticElements warnings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
